hero.title: Where Tradition Meets Elegance
hero.subtitle: Where Tradition Meets Elegance
hero.tagline: Bespoke sherwanis, suits and partywear crafted in Karachi for the modern gentleman who honours heritage.

about.story: Riwayat (روایت) began with a simple belief — that every groom deserves to wear his story. Rooted in the rich tapestry of subcontinental craftsmanship and refined by contemporary tailoring, we have dressed grooms and gentlemen across Karachi for their most important moments. From the first measurement to the final fitting, each garment is an heirloom in the making, blending heritage embroidery with the precision of modern cuts.
about.mission: To preserve the art of classic tailoring while dressing the modern man with timeless elegance.

faq.question: How long does a custom sherwani take?
faq.answer: A bespoke sherwani typically takes 3 to 4 weeks from first measurement to final fitting. We recommend booking at least 6 weeks before your event.

faq.question: Do you ship outside Karachi?
faq.answer: Yes. We serve clients across Pakistan and can arrange international shipping for finished garments. Contact us on WhatsApp for details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own fabric?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We are happy to tailor garments from fabric you provide, or guide you to our premium in-house selection.

faq.question: How many fittings are included?
faq.answer: Every bespoke order includes an initial measurement and up to two fittings to perfect the silhouette.

faq.question: Is there a price on request option?
faq.answer: Yes. Bespoke and embroidered pieces are priced on request based on fabric and detailing. Enquire via WhatsApp for a quote.

process.description: Share your vision and occasion with our stylist.
Select from premium fabrics and embroidery options.
Master tailors craft your garment by hand.
Your finished heirloom, ready for the moment.
